Records.authors: Liu, Xiao, Ma, Yan-Qing, Wang, Chen-Yu
Records.description: Two-loop non-planar (crossed) four-point integral with two massive propagators (solid lines, $m^2=1$) on the left subloop and five massless propagators (dashed lines), at $s=4$, $t=-1$, all external legs massless. Identified as the most time-consuming MI in Feng et al. 1707.04007. ODEs in $\eta$ constructed via FIRE5 IBP reduction yielding 168 MIs in the sector; ODEs have 26 distinguished singularities (6 off the imaginary axis). Numerical result given for the top-sector non-planar integral as a Laurent series from $\varepsilon^{-4}$ through $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon)$ with at least 6 correct digits. Computation took a few minutes on a laptop, $\sim 10^5$ times faster than FIESTA4.
